creator: girgen@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hio!

We're seeing bus errors with ffmpeg after updating: 

ffmpeg: 4.2.1_5,1 -> 4.2.2_6,1


$ sudo gdb -core ffmpeg.core /usr/local/bin/ffmpeg
